result.reason: While `SecureXmlHelper` effectively prevents XXE attacks during XML deserialization, a comprehensive audit is required to confirm that no other forms of code execution are possible through the subsequent use of deserialized data, especially in fields that may trigger external commands.
result.approach: Conduct a detailed security review of how deserialized `ConnectionInfo` properties (especially those related to external commands or scripting) are handled to identify and mitigate any command injection or arbitrary code execution vulnerabilities.
